models.title: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
models.summary: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.
models.title_zh: 在他的OpenAI试验中，马斯克重温了一段悠久的友谊
models.summary_zh: 这是马斯克之前在采访中和作家沃尔特·艾萨克森（ Walter Isaacson ）关于马斯克的畅销传记中讲过的故事，但周二是他第一次宣誓就职。
models.title_en: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
models.summary_en: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

models.title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
models.summary: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.
models.title_zh: 亚马逊已经在AWS上提供新的OpenAI产品
models.summary_zh: 在OpenAI让微软同意终止独家权利的第二天， AWS宣布了一系列OpenAI模型产品，包括一项新的代理服务。
models.title_en: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
models.summary_en: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

models.title: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
models.summary: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.
models.title_zh: 亚马逊在产品页面上推出基于人工智能的音频问答体验
models.summary_zh: 亚马逊新推出的“加入聊天”功能可让您询问有关产品的问题，并接收基于人工智能的音频回复。
models.title_en: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
models.summary_en: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.

models.title: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
models.summary: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.
models.title_zh: 在人类拒绝后，谷歌扩大了五角大楼对其人工智能的访问权限
models.summary_zh: 在Anthropic拒绝允许国防部将其人工智能用于国内大规模监视和自主武器之后，谷歌与该部门签署了一份新合同。
models.title_en: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
models.summary_en: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.
